news.title: AppFolio: The Right Business Model To Muscle Past The SaaSpocalypse
news.text: AppFolio remains a buy after a strong Q1 beat-and-raise, signaling resilience amid broader software sector fears. APPF's pricing model, tied to unit expansion and value-added services, insulates it from per-seat SaaS risks. Secular tailwinds in rental demand and robust fundamentals—20%+ revenue growth, high 20s margins—place APPF in the Rule of 40 category.

news.title: AppFolio (APPF) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
news.text: AppFolio (APPF) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.61 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.44 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.21 per share a year ago.

news.title: Tour24 Launches in AppFolio Stack™ Marketplace, Enabling On-Demand Self-Guided Tours
news.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Tour24 Inc., a leading self-guided touring platform for multifamily, today announced a new integration with AppFolio, the technology leader powering the future of the real estate industry. The integration connects Tour24's on-demand touring and AI-powered leasing support directly into the AppFolio Performance Platform, giving property managers a faster, more measurable path from tour to lease. news.title: AvidXchange Announces Embedded Supplier Payment Automation Solution for the AppFolio Performance Platform
news.text: CHARLOTTE, N.C., March 03, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- AvidXchange Inc., a leading provider in accounts payable (AP) automation software and payment solutions for mid-market businesses and their suppliers, today announced the launch of its Accounts Payable as a Service solution for AppFolio customers, further expanding the partnership between the two companies and making AvidXchange's payment automation solution available in the AppFolio Stack™  Marketplace.
